reasoning: The Walk inductive type requires G.Adj u u (a self-loop) for its nil base case, making Walk G u u uninhabitable for any graph without self-loops. Since inductive types in Lean 4 must be well-founded, no closed walk (Walk u u) can be constructed without a self-loop somewhere in the graph. This fundamentally changes the meaning of "closed directed walk" compared to the standard definition. Many strongly connected digraphs have no self-loops, making the Lean iff statement false while the informal theorem is true.
